1. [Code] Multiple areas of ponding water observed on flat roof sections
Visible roof deck sagging and water damage indicating potential structural compromise
Engage structural engineer for immediate assessment; restrict access to affected area pending evaluation
Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials
Maintain minimum 36-inch clearance in front of all electrical panels per NEC Article 110.26
Hood suppression system in kitchen area has expired inspection tag
Schedule semi-annual inspection of kitchen hood suppression system per NFPA 96 Section 12.2
Exterior lighting inadequate in parking area and loading dock
Install additional lighting to maintain minimum 1 foot-candle at ground level in all exterior areas
HVAC rooftop units show signs of deferred maintenance and corrosion
Establish quarterly preventive maintenance program for all mechanical equipment
Hot work permit program not formally documented
Implement written hot work permit program per NFPA 51B; train all affected personnel
